description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-progress-ring

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-ring/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Track, indicator, label. Size. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. progressbar role. aria-valuenow/min/max. aria-label. Indeterminate.
3. **Functionality** — Value (0-100). Indeterminate. Label slot (center text). Size variants. Stroke width.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. SVG calculations.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. SVG circle. Dash-offset animation. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Values. Indeterminate. SVG rendering. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** — Values. Indeterminate. Sizes. With label. Custom colors.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-progress-ring
